title: LAir's End Update
description: A mod that makes a projection of what could be a Minecraft End Update.
body:
# The Update You Dreamed Of...

This mod brings you the **End Update** that Mojang never made — designed to feel like a natural extension of vanilla Minecraft. It enhances the End dimension with new structures, mobs, resources, and quality-of-life features, all while preserving the original game's style and atmosphere.

## 🌌 End Villages

One of the main features is the addition of **End Villages**, floating high in the void and protected by powerful **End Golems**.


![End villages in End Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e371ae69117128dbc159253b55c0fa81f6052e8d.jpeg)

These villages bring late-game content, especially when paired with **[Extra Totems](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-totems/version/2.0)**. In that case, you’ll find a new villager profession: the **Totem Trader**, who exchanges **Totem Coins** (crafted from **Enderite**) for powerful totems.


![Totem Trader Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb104ad1d2d8ae61397918e64a581b11102b7c7.jpeg)
![Totem trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a873142d0bd15e4db90ffbed4fc2bc888b8499d.jpeg)

## 🌀 Shulker Outposts

Scattered across the End, **Shulker Outposts** are the End’s version of Pillager Outposts. Here, you’ll encounter a new mob: the **Swapper**, a shulker variant whose projectiles **swap your position with theirs**, making combat unpredictable.

You’ll also find valuable **End City loot** inside their chests!

![Shulker Outpost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eccb5f0f8bf44b13bf27744252b3be5eaf75ff8.jpeg)

## ⛏️ End Caves

Beneath the End’s surface lies a new underground system: the **End Caves**. These caves are filled with **Enderite Ore**, a magical material that causes nearby players to levitate — perfect for elevators, traps, or custom mechanics.

![End Caves in the End Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76e27c7d32dfc6ddd54f5a1f8224c265f2838179.jpeg)

Enderite can be crafted into **Totem Coins**, used for trading in villages.

![Craft of totem coins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ae2c9a65e051bb2761ea8316150773bc22944f.jpeg)


If you're lucky, you might come across **End Ponds**, containing a special type of water that pushes you much stronger than regular water. It’s even blocked by **Enderite Clusters**, making it potentially useful for redstone systems or farms.

![End Pond in the End Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19e445aecb2dcab6d5b43aaf726ee9dec5192fb.jpeg)

## 🍄 End Shroom Biome

Finally, this mod adds a vibrant new biome: the **End Shroom Biome**. It’s a lush purple landscape filled with giant mushrooms and hiding **Shroom Minions** — little creatures that hides in End Fungus.

![End Shroom Biome in End Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e34a5d1e9db08f073ad63bbcb5155da504abe288.jpeg)
![Shroom Minion in End Shroom Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c79ebc2f9dfafd077f163c4a957b807b27e0e0f0.jpeg)
